title: No LICENSE file
description: 486K-star repo with no LICENSE file. CC0 declared inline in README but not machine-readable. GitHub API reports 'no license'. 45,783 forks in legal gray zone.
recommendation: Add a LICENSE file (CC0-1.0 to match README declaration).

title: 462 open issues, bottlenecked maintenance
description: Large backlog of primarily link submissions and broken link reports. 1 open PR. Suggests maintenance capacity gap under commercial ownership.
recommendation: Triage backlog, close stale issues, add CONTRIBUTING.md.

title: 44 days since last push, decelerating
description: Last activity Feb 21, 2026. 1 commit in 90 days. Celebrity stagnation pattern — massive engagement with minimal maintenance.
recommendation: Monitor for continued inactivity. Consider forking if link rot becomes severe.

title: No CONTRIBUTING.md despite 30+ contributors
description: Community-maintained list with no contribution guidelines. Issue template exists but no PR template or quality criteria beyond issue template.
recommendation: Add CONTRIBUTING.md with link submission format and quality criteria.

title: Ultra-minimal structure (4 files)
description: README.md (504 lines, 390 links), ISSUE_TEMPLATE.md, .gitattributes, banner image. All value concentrated in one file.
recommendation: Appropriate for curated list, but single-file pattern limits tooling.

title: Security Facade — Copilot code review on Markdown repo
description: Copilot code review workflow with 3/4 failures. No functional CI purpose on a Markdown-only repository.

title: CC0 declared inline but not machine-readable
description: README footer has CC0 badge and declaration, but no LICENSE file exists. Automated tools cannot detect the license.
recommendation: Add CC0-1.0 LICENSE file alongside README declaration.
